conventions_label_lifecycle_295952375508.content: Label management logic lives in the engine repo (aharonyaircohen/Kody-ADE-Engine), not in tester/repo-codebase repos. Tester repos only observe and verify.

facts_pipeline_verification_295952522913.content: Verification-only pipeline stages confirm behavior by observing external state (GitHub labels) rather than by running local code assertions.
